Geddy Lucier
Senior Thesis

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)

readRenviron(".Renviron") # Build API Key into your prospective .Renviron document
setwd("~/Documents/GitHub/ENVS_Seniorthesis/")
Sys.getenv("EIA_API_KEY") # Sign up with EIA to get API key for pricing data

```

Prices
```{r}
prices <- read_csv("gas_prices.csv")

chicago <- prices[c(5,6)] %>% rename("Date" = "Date...5", "Chi_Price" = "Last Price...6")
algonquin <- prices[c(1,2)]  %>% rename("Date" = "Date...1", "Alg_Price" = "Last Price...2")
henry <- prices[c(3,4)] %>% rename("Date" = "Date...3", "Hen_Price" = "Last Price...4")

master_dates <- chicago %>%
  select("Date") %>%
  distinct()

full_df <- master_dates %>%
  left_join(henry, by = "Date") %>%
  left_join(chicago, by = "Date") %>%
  left_join(algonquin, by = "Date") %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y"),
         Year =  format(Date, "%Y"),
         Month = format(Date, "%m"))



```

Subset Datasets
```{r}
no_24 <- full_df %>% filter(Year != "2024") # remove 2024 due to too many NAs 

winter_df <- full_df %>% filter(Month == c("10","11","12","01","02","03"))



```

Test_Plot
```{r}
ggplot(no_24, aes(x = Date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Hen_Price, color = "Henry Hub"), size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Chi_Price, color = "Chicago"),   size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Alg_Price, color = "Algonquin"), size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Henry Hub" = "#2A9D8F",
      "Chicago"   = "#264653",
      "Algonquin" = "#E76F51"
    ),
    name = "Hub"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Natural Gas Prices Over Time",
    x = "Date",
    y = "USD per mmBtu"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 10))


```

```{r}
no_24 <- no_24 %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::year(Date))

years <- sort(unique(no_24$Year))

for (yr in years) {

  yearly_df <- no_24 %>% filter(Year == yr)

  p <- ggplot(yearly_df, aes(x = Date)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Hen_Price, color = "Henry Hub"), size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Chi_Price, color = "Chicago"),   size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Alg_Price, color = "Algonquin"), size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Henry Hub" = "#2A9D8F",
        "Chicago"   = "#264653",
        "Algonquin" = "#E76F51"
      ),
      name = "Hub"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Natural Gas Prices in", yr),
      x = "Date",
      y = "USD per mmBtu"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 10))

  print(p)
}

```



```{r}
full_df %>%
  filter(Date >= as.Date("2017-01-01"), # play around with dates 
         Date <= as.Date("2018-12-31")) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Hen_Price, color = "Henry Hub"), size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_line(aes(y = Chi_Price, color = "Chicago"),   size = 1, alpha = 0.9) + # comment out lines 
   geom_line(aes(y = Alg_Price, color = "Algonquin"), size = 1, alpha = 0.9) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Henry Hub" = "#2A9D8F",
        "Chicago"   = "#264653",
        "Algonquin" = "#E76F51"
      ),
      name = "Hub"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Natural Gas Prices (2016–2017)",
      x = "Date",
      y = "USD per mmBtu"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 11)
    ) 
```


```{r}
no_24 %>%
  mutate(
    alg_hh  = Alg_Price - Hen_Price,
    alg_chi = Alg_Price - Chi_Price,
    chi_hh  = Chi_Price - Hen_Price
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(Date)) +
  
  # Lines with consistent colors
  geom_line(aes(y = alg_hh,  color = "Algonquin – Henry Hub"),  size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = alg_chi, color = "Algonquin – Chicago"),   size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = chi_hh,  color = "Chicago – Henry Hub"),   size = 1) +
  
  # consistent palette
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Algonquin – Henry Hub" = "#D55E00",   # Algonquin (orange)
      "Algonquin – Chicago"   = "#0072B2",   # Chicago (blue)
      "Chicago – Henry Hub"   = "#009E73"    # Henry Hub (green)
    ),
    name = "Spread"
  ) +
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 20)) +
  labs(
    title = "Daily Natural Gas Basis Spreads",
    subtitle = "Consistent color scheme calibrated to hub prices (Algonquin, Chicago, Henry Hub)",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Spread ($/MMBtu)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11)
  )
```
```{r}
no_24_spreads <- no_24 %>%
  mutate(
    alg_hh  = Alg_Price - Hen_Price,
    alg_chi = Alg_Price - Chi_Price,
    chi_hh  = Chi_Price - Hen_Price,
    Year = year(Date)
  )

years <- sort(unique(no_24_spreads$Year))

for (yr in years) {

  df_year <- no_24_spreads %>% filter(Year == yr)

  p <- ggplot(df_year, aes(x = Date)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = alg_hh,  color = "Alg - HH")) +
    geom_line(aes(y = alg_chi, color = "Alg - Chicago")) +
    geom_line(aes(y = chi_hh,  color = "Chicago - HH")) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Alg - Chicago" = "#E76F51",
        "Alg - HH"      = "#2A9D8F",
        "Chicago - HH"  = "#457B9D"
      ),
      name = "Spread"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 20)) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Natural Gas Spreads in", yr),
      x = "Date",
      y = "Spread (USD/mmBtu)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 11)
    )

  print(p)
}

```
Just Winters
```{r}
years <- unique(lubridate::year(winter_df$Date))

for (yr in years) {
  
  df_year <- winter_df %>% 
    filter(lubridate::year(Date) == yr)
  
  p <- ggplot(df_year, aes(Date)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Hen_Price, color = "Henry Hub"), size = 1) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Chi_Price, color = "Chicago"), size = 1) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Alg_Price, color = "Algonquin"), size = 1) +
    labs(title = paste("Winter Prices:", yr),
         x = "Date", 
         y = "Price ($/MMBtu)",
         color = "Hub") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  print(p)
}

```
```{r}
winter_df <- winter_df %>% 
  filter(format(Date,"%m") %in% c("10","11","12","01","02","03"))


winter_df <- winter_df %>%
  mutate(
    Winter_Season = if_else(
      format(Date,"%m") %in% c("10","11","12"),
      paste0(year(Date), "-", year(Date)+1),
      paste0(year(Date)-1, "-", year(Date))
    )
  )

seasons <- unique(winter_df$Winter_Season)

for(s in unique(winter_df$Winter_Season)) {
  
  df_s <- winter_df %>% filter(Winter_Season == s)
  
  p <- ggplot(df_s, aes(Date)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Alg_Price, color="Algonquin")) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Chi_Price, color="Chicago")) +
    geom_line(aes(y = Hen_Price, color="Henry Hub")) +
    labs(title = paste("Winter Season:", s),
         y="Price ($/MMBtu)") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  print(p)
}

```


Stats
```{r}
stats <- no_24 %>%
  mutate(
    # Log returns
    Alg_ret = log(Alg_Price / lag(Alg_Price)),
    HH_ret  = log(Hen_Price / lag(Hen_Price)),
    Chi_ret = log(Chi_Price / lag(Chi_Price)),

    # Price changes
    Alg_diff = Alg_Price - lag(Alg_Price),
    HH_diff  = Hen_Price - lag(Hen_Price),
    Chi_diff = Chi_Price - lag(Chi_Price),

    # Spreads
    spread_Alg_HH  = Alg_Price - Hen_Price,
    spread_Alg_Chi = Alg_Price - Chi_Price,
    spread_Chi_HH  = Chi_Price - Hen_Price
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    # Return vols
    Alg_vol_ret = sd(Alg_ret, na.rm = TRUE),
    HH_vol_ret  = sd(HH_ret, na.rm = TRUE),
    Chi_vol_ret = sd(Chi_ret, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Price-change vols
    Alg_vol_diff = sd(Alg_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    HH_vol_diff  = sd(HH_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    Chi_vol_diff = sd(Chi_diff, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Spread vols
    spread_vol_Alg_HH  = sd(spread_Alg_HH, na.rm = TRUE),
    spread_vol_Alg_Chi = sd(spread_Alg_Chi, na.rm = TRUE),
    spread_vol_Chi_HH  = sd(spread_Chi_HH, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

cat(
  "\n--- INDIVIDUAL RETURN VOLATILITY ---\n",
  "Algonquin Return Volatility: ", stats$Alg_vol_ret,  "\n",
  "Henry Hub Return Volatility: ", stats$HH_vol_ret,   "\n",
  "Chicago Return Volatility:  ", stats$Chi_vol_ret,   "\n\n",

  "--- INDIVIDUAL PRICE-CHANGE VOLATILITY ---\n",
  "Algonquin Price Change Volatility: ", stats$Alg_vol_diff, "\n",
  "Henry Hub Price Change Volatility: ", stats$HH_vol_diff,  "\n",
  "Chicago Price Change Volatility:  ", stats$Chi_vol_diff,  "\n\n",

  "--- SPREAD VOLATILITY (Basis Vol) ---\n",
  "Alg - HH Spread Volatility:  ", stats$spread_vol_Alg_HH,  "\n",
  "Alg - Chi Spread Volatility: ", stats$spread_vol_Alg_Chi, "\n",
  "Chi - HH Spread Volatility:  ", stats$spread_vol_Chi_HH,  "\n"
)

```
By Year 
```{r}
stats_by_year <- no_24 %>%
  arrange(Date) %>%
  group_by(year = year(Date)) %>%
  mutate(
    # Log returns
    Alg_ret = log(Alg_Price / lag(Alg_Price)),
    HH_ret  = log(Hen_Price / lag(Hen_Price)),
    Chi_ret = log(Chi_Price / lag(Chi_Price)),

    # Price changes
    Alg_diff = Alg_Price - lag(Alg_Price),
    HH_diff  = Hen_Price - lag(Hen_Price),
    Chi_diff = Chi_Price - lag(Chi_Price),

    # Spreads
    spread_Alg_HH  = Alg_Price - Hen_Price,
    spread_Alg_Chi = Alg_Price - Chi_Price,
    spread_Chi_HH  = Chi_Price - Hen_Price
  ) %>%
  summarize(
    # Return vols
    Alg_vol_ret = sd(Alg_ret, na.rm = TRUE),
    HH_vol_ret  = sd(HH_ret, na.rm = TRUE),
    Chi_vol_ret = sd(Chi_ret, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Price-change vols
    Alg_vol_diff = sd(Alg_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    HH_vol_diff  = sd(HH_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
    Chi_vol_diff = sd(Chi_diff, na.rm = TRUE),

    # Spread vols
    spread_vol_Alg_HH  = sd(spread_Alg_HH, na.rm = TRUE),
    spread_vol_Alg_Chi = sd(spread_Alg_Chi, na.rm = TRUE),
    spread_vol_Chi_HH  = sd(spread_Chi_HH, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

for (i in 1:nrow(stats_by_year)) {
  y <- stats_by_year$year[i]
  cat("\n============ YEAR:", y, "============\n")
  
  cat("--- INDIVIDUAL RETURN VOLATILITY ---\n",
      "Algonquin Return Volatility:", stats_by_year$Alg_vol_ret[i], "\n",
      "Henry Hub Return Volatility:", stats_by_year$HH_vol_ret[i],  "\n",
      "Chicago Return Volatility:",   stats_by_year$Chi_vol_ret[i], "\n\n")
  
  cat("--- INDIVIDUAL PRICE-CHANGE VOLATILITY ---\n",
      "Algonquin Price Change Vol:", stats_by_year$Alg_vol_diff[i], "\n",
      "Henry Hub Price Change Vol:", stats_by_year$HH_vol_diff[i],  "\n",
      "Chicago Price Change Vol:",   stats_by_year$Chi_vol_diff[i], "\n\n")
  
  cat("--- SPREAD VOLATILITY (Basis Vol) ---\n",
      "Alg - HH Spread Vol:",  stats_by_year$spread_vol_Alg_HH[i],  "\n",
      "Alg - Chi Spread Vol:", stats_by_year$spread_vol_Alg_Chi[i], "\n",
      "Chi - HH Spread Vol:",  stats_by_year$spread_vol_Chi_HH[i],  "\n")
}

```
```{r}
stats_long <- stats_by_year %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -year,
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  )

stats_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("Alg_vol_ret", "HH_vol_ret", "Chi_vol_ret")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = value, color = metric)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Return Volatility by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Volatility"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

stats_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("Alg_vol_diff", "HH_vol_diff", "Chi_vol_diff")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, value, color = metric)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Price Change Volatility by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Volatility ($/MMBtu)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

stats_long %>%
  filter(metric %in% c("spread_vol_Alg_HH", 
                       "spread_vol_Alg_Chi", 
                       "spread_vol_Chi_HH")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, value, color = metric)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Basis (Spread) Volatility by Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Volatility ($/MMBtu)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

stats_deltas <- stats_by_year %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(across(-year, ~ .x - lag(.x), .names = "delta_{col}"))

deltas_long <- stats_deltas %>%
  select(year, starts_with("delta_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -year,
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "delta_value"
  )

deltas_long %>%
  ggplot(aes(year, delta_value, color = metric)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Year-to-Year Changes in Volatility",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Δ Volatility"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
